app.title: Nomad Braid
app.tagline: Afro hair, braids, wigs, nails & makeup — at home or in-salon.
section.hero.title: Nomad Braid
section.hero.subtitle: At each event, Nomad Braid brings together afro hair specialists from your city, carefully selected to offer you a high-quality hair experience at discovery prices.
section.why.title: Why Nomad Braid
section.why.body: Nomad Braid is a pop-up hair event that showcases providers specialized in afro hair techniques and celebrates the hair expertise of our community. In every city, you can come get your hair done, discover new talent and meet brands from the community. Tell us how you style your hair today and be among the first to hear about the next Nomad Braid event in your city.
